text: Your DNA sequence isn’t the whole story. Chemical switches called epigenetics decide what genes actually do. Think of methylation and histone marks as tiny on/off switches for your genes. Your environment can influence these switches, changing gene expression without altering DNA. But remember, inherited traits through epigenetics are still being studied. Curious about how your genes can be influenced? Follow for more scientific insights!
